COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ann Morency.
No appearances by the Defendant: Janice L. Gruver.
09:40 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Janice L. Gruver, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit A- Rental Agreement -------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit B1-B11 - Photos------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit C1- Thirty day notice dtd. 01-06-04-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit C2- Thirty day notice dtd. 01-29-04-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit D- Ltr. dtd. 07-29-04 by SF. Dept. of Public Health----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit E- Notice to Abate Nuisance by SF. Dept. of Public Health----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit G- Three day notice--------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at 407 Columbus Ave., San Francisco.
Lease and security deposit of $620.00 declared forfeited.
Hold Over Damages $641.00
Costs $234.00
Other: (CCP 1174(b) Malicious Hold Over $600.00, for a total of $1,475.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
